chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 65 – The Indication and the wordings upon Amir Al Momineen<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (287/ 3)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (287/ 3)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ هَلْ لِلْمَاءِ الَّذِي يُغَسَّلُ بِهِ الْمَيِّتُ حَدٌّ مَحْدُودٌ قَالَ إِنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) قَالَ لِعَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا مِتُّ فَاسْتَقِ سِتَّ قِرَبٍ مِنْ مَاءِ بِئْرِ غَرْسٍ فَغَسِّلْنِي وَ كَفِّنِّي وَ حَنِّطْنِي فَإِذَا فَرَغْتَ مِنْ غُسْلِي وَ كَفْنِي فَخُذْ بِجَوَامِعِ كَفَنِي وَ أَجْلِسْنِي ثُمَّ سَلْنِي عَمَّا شِئْتَ فَوَ اللَّهِ لَا تَسْأَلُنِي عَنْ شَيْ‏ءٍ إِلَّا أَجَبْتُكَ فِيهِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Abu Nasr, from Fuzayl Bin Sukrat who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! Is there a restrictive limit for the water which the deceased is washed with?’ He<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said to Ali<sup>asws</sup>: ‘When I<sup>saww</sup> pass away, so draw six pitchers of water of a well of Ghars, so wash me<sup>saww</sup>, and enshroud me<sup>saww</sup>, and embalm me<sup>saww</sup>. So when you<sup>asws</sup> are free from washing me<sup>saww</sup> and enshrouding me<sup>asws</sup>, so grab me<sup>saww</sup> with the entirety of my<sup>saww</sup> shroud and sit me<sup>saww</sup> up, then ask me<sup>saww</sup> about whatever you<sup>asws</sup> so desire to, for by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, you<sup>asws</sup> will not ask me<sup>saww</sup> about anything except that I<sup>saww</sup> would answer you<sup>asws</sup> with regards to it’.
en.sarwar: 7. A number of our people has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr from Fudayl (ibn) Sukkarah who has said that he said to abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) the following. “‘May Allah take my soul in service for your cause, is there a certain quantitiyof water required to give Ghusl (bath) a dead person?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “The Messenger of Allah said to Ali (a.s.), ‘When I will die draw six sacks of water from the well Ghars (name of the well). Then wash my body, shroud it and rub camphor on my forehead, palms, knees and toes. When you finish washing my body and shrouding hold by the ends of the shroud and set my body in a sitting posture then ask me whatever you would like. I swear by Allah, you would not ask me anything but that I will give you an answer in it.”
